lessons.title: Nature of a Lease and Distinction from Licence
lessons.description: Let us begin with the most fundamental question: what is a lease?

lessons.title: Covenants in Leases
lessons.description: Covenants in leases fall into two categories: express covenants, which the parties have specifically agreed to in the lease document; and implied covenants, which are implied by law regardless of whether the parties have included them in writing.

lessons.title: Residential Tenancies Act 2004
lessons.description: Let us begin with the scope of the Act. The Residential Tenancies Act 2004 applies to dwelling lettings — the letting of a dwelling for residential use by an individual as their home.

lessons.title: Commercial Leases and Ground Rents
lessons.description: Let us begin with commercial leases.
